08)%3Bpadding-top%3A6px%3Boverflow%3Ahidden%3Btext-overflow%3Aellipsis%3Bwhite-space%3Anowrap%22%3E%24%7Bl(t.tagPath)%7D%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20style%3D%22margin-top%3A6px%3Btext-align%3Aright%3Bpointer-events%3Aauto%22%3E%24%7Bk%7D%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%60%7D%7Dfunction%20l(o)%7Breturn%20o.replace(%2F%26%2Fg%2C%22%26amp%3B%22).replace(%2F%3C%2Fg%2C%22%26lt%3B%22).replace(%2F%3E%2Fg%2C%22%26gt%3B%22).replace(%2F%22%2Fg%2C%22%26quot%3B%22)%7Dfunction%20f(o%2Ct%2Ce)%7Breturn%60%3Cdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20style%3D%22font-size%3A8px%3Bcolor%3A%24%7Bo%7D%3Bfont-weight%3A700%3Bletter-spacing%3A.12em%3Btext-transform%3Auppercase%3Bmargin-bottom%3A3px%22%3E%24%7Bt%7D%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%20%20%3Cdiv%20style%3D%22font-size%3A10px%3Bcolor%3A%23fff%3Bfont-family%3Aui-monospace%2Cmonospace%22%3E%24%7Be%7D%3C%2Fdiv%3E%0A%20%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%60%7Dfunction%20x()%7Bvar%20t%3Bif((t%3Dwindow.FontInspector)!%3Dnull%26%26t._i)%7Bwindow.FontInspector.toggle()%3Breturn%7Dconst%20o%3Dnew%20%24%3Bwindow.FontInspector%3D%7B_i%3Ao%2Ctoggle()%7Bo.toggle()%7D%2Cdestroy()%7Bo.destroy()%2Cdelete%20window.FontInspector%7D%7D%2Co.toggle()%7Ddocument.readyState%3D%3D%3D%22loading%22%3Fdocument.addEventListener(%22DOMContentLoaded%22%2Cx)%3Ax()%7D)()%3B
